description: ERP outbox idempotent sync pattern (BL-169) — SAP / 1C connector stub
ddl: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mes_erp_outbox (id UUID PRIMARY KEY, entity_type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, entity_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, payload_json TEXT NOT NULL, idempotency_key VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL UNIQUE, status VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), processed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NULL);

connectorNotes.sap: Map entityType=WORK_ORDER to BAPI_PRODORD_CREATE or IDoc ORDERS05
connectorNotes.1c: Map entityType=WORK_ORDER to HTTP exchange document via published BFF
